win_condition: After 10 rounds, highest total score wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with most favor tokens wins; if still tied, tied player with highest private objective score wins.

categories.label: Public Objectives
categories.description: Points from all active public objective cards.

categories.label: Private Objective
categories.description: Sum of dice values matching private objective color.

categories.label: Empty Spaces Penalty
categories.description: Subtract 1 point per empty space in window pattern.
